steps.title: Identify the construction process
steps.content: The passage immediately explains how Dingle constructs her baskets: she “skillfully winds a thin palm frond around a bunch of sweetgrass” to create the final product. This description reveals that sweetgrass and palmetto palm are the primary materials of these baskets.

steps.title: Match the material relationship
steps.content:
"Handmade from" is the only choice that identifies these materials as the actual components of the baskets.

The other three choices create wrong relationships, suggesting the materials are indicators, symbols, or collection tools rather than construction materials.

That confirms B is correct.
